classification.reason: The trusted Jira preset brief identifies one Jira Story for reworking the workflow sidebar visual and semantic structure into the first-column slice of the Workflows table.

sourceStory.summary: Rework the sidebar into the Workflows table first-column slice

canonicalInput.jiraPresetBrief:
MM-1116: Rework the sidebar into the Workflows table first-column slice

Source Reference
Source Document: docs/UI/WorkflowListDisplayModes.md
Source Title: Workflow List Display Modes
Source Sections:
- 8. Sidebar-as-table-slice visual contract
- 9. Motion and continuity
Canonical Claim IDs:
- CLAIM-docs-ui-workflowlistdisplaymodes-008
- CLAIM-docs-ui-workflowlistdisplaymodes-009
Coverage IDs:
- DESIGN-REQ-008
- DESIGN-REQ-009
Remaining Work
Keep the existing authorized sidebar navigation behavior where useful, but replace the visual/semantic structure with a table-slice variant sharing row/frame primitives and metrics with the full Workflows table.
Already Implemented Evidence
- DESIGN-REQ-008 - partially_met - frontend/src/entrypoints/workflow-detail.tsx renders a sidebar list with active-row aria-current and status/title rows, and frontend/src/styles/dashboard.css fixes compact sidebar row sizing and separators.
- DESIGN-REQ-008 - unmet - frontend/src/entrypoints/workflow-detail.tsx renders the sidebar as ul/li navigation without a Workflow header row or shared table/sidebar row primitive; frontend/src/styles/dashboard.css uses sidebar-specific 3.75rem row sizing rather than the requested shared workflow-list metric tokens.
- DESIGN-REQ-009 - unmet - No implementation evidence was found for sidebar/table transition geometry, divider alignment, shared scroll/focus continuity, or reduced-motion behavior for the three-mode table-slice contract.
Original Story Scope
As a user moving between sidebar and full table, I need the sidebar to look and behave like the first column of the Workflows table so the mode change feels continuous.

Acceptance criteria
- The sidebar has a header row labeled Workflow before any selectable workflow rows.
- Sidebar header typography, casing, background, border, padding, and non-hover behavior match the full table first-column header.
- Sidebar and table share row metric tokens for header height, body row height, workflow column width, divider width, and divider color.
- Sidebar rows have the same block size as full table rows and clamp titles or compact supplements without increasing row height.
- Switching between sidebar and table preserves row geometry, aligns the divider, avoids large page-slide animations, and respects reduced-motion settings.
Requirements
- Prefer shared row/frame primitives capable of rendering table and sidebar variants.
- Preserve table-equivalent semantics if div/grid markup is required.
- Do not present the sidebar as cards, a menu, or an unrelated navigation rail.
Acceptance Criteria
- Render a sidebar header row labeled Workflow before selectable workflow rows.
- Match sidebar header typography, casing, background, border, padding, and non-hover behavior to the full table first-column header.
- Share row metric tokens for header height, body row height, workflow column width, divider width, and divider color between sidebar and table.
- Keep sidebar rows the same block size as full table rows and clamp titles or compact supplements without increasing row height.
- Preserve row geometry, align the divider, avoid large page-slide animations, and respect reduced-motion settings when switching between sidebar and table.
Requirements
- Prefer shared row/frame primitives capable of rendering table and sidebar variants.
- Preserve table-equivalent semantics if div/grid markup is required.
- Do not present the sidebar as cards, a menu, or an unrelated navigation rail.
